titleStmt.title: SII 38.380: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 380. (A.R. No. 380 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Vīraprātapa A[chyu]tayyadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1455, Hēviḷambi (wrong), Mārgaḻi, śu•••Puṇarpūsam, Monday.

summary.p: Records that two shepherds Eṭṭukkōṉ and Āṉaikkōṉ, who had been supplying ghee, to ••••••Sembiyam Maṅgalam Iḍaittuṟaippaḍaivīḍu, had to measure out one tūṇi and one padakku of ghee to the temple in order to burn a lamp daily on the mountain for the (god) Tirumalar-uḍaiya tambirāṉār of Dēvakkapuram, for the merit of Piḻaipoṟuttār Tirumalaināthar. It is also stated that the accountant of the temple and ūr, Uttaṇḍi engraved the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śustiśrī .Read svastiśrī [śrī*]maṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟatāpa AntaiyaRead accutayateva
makārāyar piṟutiviyirācciyam paṇiṇRead paṇṇiAruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 5 mel cellāniṉṟa
Ēviḷampi varuṣam mārkaḻimātam pūṟuvapaṣattuRead pakṣattupuṇarpūcamum comavāramum peṟṟa nāḷ tevakkapuram
tirumalaruṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku tirumalai mele tiṉamum Oru viḷakku Iṭṭu varukiṟattukku piḻaipoṟuttar
tirumalainātarpiḷḷaikku puṇṇiyam Āka periyamutaliyār piḷḷai[ kku] cempiyam
maṅkalam Iṭaittuṟaip paṭaiviṭṭukku Iṟukkiṟa kuṭi Eṭṭukkoṉ Āṉaikkoṉ varuṣam Oṉṟukku tiruviḷa
kku Aḷakkum neyi ta ṅa Inta neyi tūṇipatakkum varuṣam varuṣam toṟum tirukkoyilukku Aḷa
ntu cukattile Irukkavum Inta taṉmattukku yātoruvar Akutam paṇṇiṉavāḷRead paṇṇiṉavarkaḷkeṅkai
karaiyile kāraāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭaivāḷRead pokakaṭaivarkaḷ Ākavum Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷukku
Inta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Ūrkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.380 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
